prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: chapter poster. Story world: Signal From Kharon-9. Premise: Telemetry returns from a decommissioned orbital array and predicts player replies.. Setting: Mountain observatory and subterranean receiver array. Threat presence: The Quiet Orbit. Recurring motifs: black stars, phase drift, echoing pings. Arc focus: Contact and Contradiction (OPENING). Summary: The case opens with impossible evidence and uncertain allies.. Create cinematic key art with readable clue anchors and escalating threat language.. Subgenre: cosmic horror. Tone: INTENSE. Arc focus: Contact and Contradiction (OPENING). Summary: The case opens with impossible evidence and uncertain allies.. Create cinematic key art with readable clue anchors and escalating threat language.. Immediate scene brief: Signal From Kharon-9 - Contact and Contradiction Arc Key Art. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. No title treatment, no UI overlay, no case notes panel, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no poster typography, no debug text. Compose a high-end key art image with a dominant focal threat, layered foreground and background storytelling, a strong silhouette, and clear thematic clues embedded in the environment. Keep it elegant, unsettling, and market-ready.
